requirements.title: Structural tests assert the v2.4.0 framework is wired

NO new agent — same scoping as v2.2.0 RD-7; deterministic checks don't need judgment-heavy reviewer
tests/fixtures/vao/external-state-not-asserted-email-invite.json + tests/fixtures/vao/fabricated-verification-table.json — each new failure mode needs a canonical positive case
NO new test file — extend existing test_vao_live_verification_claim.py + test_verified_live_discipline.py; co-locates with v2.2.0 tests
MCP-direct integration with Gmail/SendGrid/Stripe/etc. — v2.4.x extension

front_to_back_integration_criterion: N/A — documentation + structural-test + tool extension. The plugin's PRODUCT gains stronger verified-live discipline; the plugin's OWN test surface is pytest stdlib-only.
